title: helianthus attenuatus
intro: Helianthus attenuatus, also known as the narrow-leafed sunflower, is a perennial plant species native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The leaves and flowers of Helianthus attenuatus can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures for herbal use.
